CardPreview.lede: Card is the composition primitive for any row-like or block-like surface. The same component spec serves the news feed (Julien, P1), the document library (P2), the back-office data row (Sylvie, P5 density=compact), and the public landing block (P7 density=spacious). Switch theme + density to stress-test.

newsFeed.description: Comfortable density. Header + body + footer. StatusPill in the top-right corner conveys the offline-first cache state.
newsFeed.title: New CE-marking requirements for low-voltage installations
newsFeed.body: Updates to NF C 15-100 take effect 1 July 2026. Includes a checklist for residential installations completed after the effective date.

docLibrary.description: Row-style Cards in a stack. The downloaded indicator is part of the StatusPill — color alone never carries it.

backOffice.description: Same Card spec, density="compact". Padding shrinks, font drops to body.sm, touch targets in nested Buttons stay at 44pt — density NEVER compresses interactive primitives.
backOffice.title: Article

stale.description: stale={true} dims the content area to opacity.stale (0.6) and shows a calm refreshing indicator. The StatusPill is exempt — the user must SEE the status.

landing.eyebrow: Public landing block · Karim + Léa (P6, P7)
landing.description: density="spacious" for the public-facing discovery surface. No login wall (P6). Substance before relationship (P7).
landing.title: Discover the electrical-integration trade
landing.body: Free guides, real worksite stories, and a hands-on training calendar — built by the FFIE federation of 7,300 professionals.

info.title: Info modal
info.description: Single action — acknowledge and close. No destructive path.
info.modalDescription: The back-office will be unavailable on Sunday 7 June 2026 from 02:00 to 04:00 for a database upgrade.

confirm.title: Confirm modal
confirm.description: Non-destructive action — publish, send, validate. Cancel returns the editor to draft.
confirm.modalDescription: “New CE-marking requirements for low-voltage installations” will be visible to all 7,300 FFIE members immediately.

destructive.title: Destructive modal · undo
destructive.description: P5 — the modal IS the confirmation. Clicking Delete closes the modal and fires a 60s undo toast.
destructive.modalDescription: “NF C 15-100 §7.2 — Cable management” will be removed from the federation library. Members' cached copies remain until their next sync.

Overview.title: FFIE Design System
Overview.lede: A live preview of the canonical token module that powers the FFIE mobile app and back-office. Edits to tokens.ts hot-reload here automatically.

brandResolution.title: Brand resolution
brandResolution.body: The brand layer was extracted from {ffieLink} on {date}. The institutional navy {navy} comes from the federation logo; the teal CTA {teal} is the most-used color in the site's compiled stylesheet (58 occurrences). Both ramps live under {brandToken}. The previous indigo placeholder has been removed.

syncBlock.title: How this preview stays in sync
syncBlock.body: This Next.js app imports the canonical tokens module directly from {tokensPath} via a webpack alias and {externalDir}. When a token value changes upstream, Next Fast Refresh re-renders the preview — no sync step. The contrast badges throughout the site are computed at render time from {contrastPath}, not hardcoded.

color.title: Color
color.blurb: Primitive ramps (50–950) including the FFIE brand navy + teal. Semantic bindings per theme, WCAG AAA/AA badges computed at render time.

typography.title: Typography
typography.blurb: 1.25 modular scale on a 16pt base, system font stack, four weights, four line-heights.

spacing.title: Spacing
spacing.blurb: 4pt base. 4-step from 0–16, 8-step from 16+. Unitless RN-compatible numbers.

sizing.title: Sizing
sizing.blurb: Touch targets (44 / 48 / 56) per P1. Icon sizes xs→xl.

motion.title: Motion
motion.blurb: Durations include the FFIE-specific 60000ms undo window (P5) and 600ms destructive confirm.

radii.title: Radii
radii.blurb: none → full pill, used consistently across components.

elevation.title: Elevation
elevation.blurb: Structured per-platform tokens: { ios, android, web } for RN portability.

themes.title: Themes
themes.blurb: Switch between light, dark, and sunlight. Sunlight is a separate semantic theme — borders carry elevation, not shadows.

tokens.title: Tokens table
tokens.blurb: Flat, searchable view of every primitive and theme binding.

flows.title: User flows
flows.blurb: Canonical scenarios from the personas brief, drawn against the design principles. Read each as a product contract.
